title: Deadshot.io
instructions: High-octane browser FPS! WASD to move, Mouse to aim and shoot. Space to jump, Shift to sprint. R to reload. Aim for the head!

title: Splix.io
instructions: Expand your territory! Arrow Keys or Swipe to move. Surround a block of area to capture it and add it to your zone. Don't let others hit your trail!

title: Lordz.io
instructions: Assemble the biggest army! Mouse or Touch to move. Collect gold to buy soldiers. Build houses for population and towers for defense. Split with Space.

title: Karate Bros
instructions: Fast-paced martial arts duels! WASD or Touch to move. Click or Tap to attack. Time your strikes and dodges to defeat opponents in the arena.

title: Starblast.io
instructions: Intense space combat! Mouse or Touch to pilot your ship. Left-click or Tap to fire. Mine asteroids to upgrade your ship and survive against other players.

title: Smash Karts
instructions: Battle it out in high-speed go-karts! WASD or Arrow Keys to drive. Spacebar to use weapons. Pick up boxes for power-ups and smash your rivals!

title: Space Waves (Official)
instructions: Navigate through dangerous tunnels! Click or Space to move up, release to move down. Avoid obstacles and spikes at all costs. Precision is key!

title: Count Masters
instructions: Lead your crowd to victory! Slide Mouse/Finger to move. Pass through gates to multiply your followers. Crash into rivals and take down the final boss!

title: Doodle Road
instructions: Draw your way to the finish line! Click and Drag to draw roads, ramps, and bridges. Guide the car safely to the flag using your creativity and physics logic.

title: BuildRoyale.io
instructions: Jump into the battle! WASD to move, 1-6 keys to switch weapons. Mouse to aim/shoot. E to interact/pick up items. Q to enter build mode. Survival of the fittest!

title: Shell Shockers
instructions: Use WASD to move and Mouse to aim and shoot. Press E to switch weapons, R to reload, and Space to jump. Crack your enemies before they crack you!

title: Witchcat
instructions: Navigate the witchcat through the puzzles!

title: Doodle Jump
instructions: Jump up the platforms! Use the left and right arrow keys to move. Avoid falling.

title: Space Invaders 3D
instructions: Navigate your spaceship using the Arrow Keys or WASD. Press Spacebar to shoot aliens! Defeat boss waves to progress and grab glowing power-ups to upgrade your multi-shot lasers.
